CLI/home/brian/dev/postgresql-job-queue-benchmarking/.venv/bin/bench run --systems awa --replicas 1 --worker-count 128 --producer-rate 50000 --producer-mode depth-target --target-depth 2000 --phase warmup=warmup:60s --phase clean=clean:60m
